name: transition-state-verification
description: User wants to verify their workflow transitions work correctly

input.userMessage: /cyoda:test — guided mode, Order entity with submit transition

expectedBehavior: Generates populated smoke-test.sh with ENTITY_NAME=order, TRANSITION_NAME=submit
Shows complete script with no placeholders remaining
antiPatterns: Leaving ${ENTITY_NAME} placeholders in the generated script
Running tests automatically in guided mode
